chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.D-379 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 01.12.2025. Mr. Kamaluddin, advocate for respondent-University Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. = Petitioner Professor Dr. Parveen Munshi has filed this petition under Article-199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973, seeking the following relief:- “a) The petitioner respectfully prays that this honourable Court may be pleased to direct the respondents first to decide the pending case of petitioner being top most qaulified meritorious professor in the light of order dated 14.11.17 in CPD no 4000/14 and 5.10.17 passed by this honorable court in CDP no 2320/13. b) It is further prayed that the operation of circular dated 6.2.19 issued by Registrar University of Sindh may be suspended till the compliance of above mentioned orders of this honorable court. c) Any other relief deemed fit and proper by the Honorable court.” At the very outset, learned counsel for the respondent-University submits that the petitioner stood retired long ago therefore, no further action is required in this case in terms of the comments filed by the respondent-University. Since, the petitioner and her counsel are called absent without intimation hence, this Court is left with no option but to dismiss the lis in default. JUDGE JUDGE
